item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses adding the new confirmation person, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior downstream manual gates across the week, moves upstream to the recurring process/data/ownership failure around identity/warehouse/barcode/batch validation, and proposes freezing new terminal manual posts plus upstream admission-control ownership.
